content:
It’s that time of year again! Back to school shopping used to be my favorite thing. New and colorful folders, pencil cases and gel pens; book bags, accessories and clothes- nothing like getting a chance to start anew. Here are all the beautiful Etsy items that made my cut this year for my Back to School Guide 2015!

Whether you or your child is in kindergarten, grade school, high school or college (or even if you’re a teacher!), this treasury has something for you! Check out all the links below or find the original Etsy treasury here. Happy shopping!

  1. Summerlin Design Co.
  2. Fox and Wit
  3. Mrs. Mackenzie’s Monogram
  4. The Carbon Crusader
  5. Marigold Prints
  6. Beach Blues
  7. Sew Berry Cute Boutique
  8. Seventh and Lark
  9. Mapology
  10. Stick With Me Shop
  11. Printable Wall Story
  12. Painted Peach Studio
  13. RainydayRustics
  14. Broke Bitch Paper Co.
  15. Tai’s Tags
  16. Crazy Dog T-Shirts

Next week I’m going to show you how to make a laundry bag for your dorm room made from a pillowcase as part of my new series: Dorm Hacks! It’s a perfect project to end the Summer with! Maybe I’ll even do a post on making your own detergent too. 🙂

Which back to school item is your favorite?
